manifest.name: Colorizelt

name: Colorizelt

releases.author: WiNE-iNEFF
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WiNE-iNEFF/colorizelt/compare/0.0.6...8a50327afbb3dc2da88ddce371502c17f01a1029

![Setting_Modal](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/84c02935-ea35-4be6-834b-283d0e999ffe)

The new version of the **Colorizelt** introduces a convenient modal window that allows you to easily and quickly edit, add, or remove colors used in the plugin. No need to go into the settings – everything can be done in just a couple of clicks directly from the plugin interface! This update makes the plugin customization process even simpler and more intuitive for PC users.

For open modal you should push right mouse button on editor and find button "_Edit Colors_":

![new_button](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ea7acb46-6663-47ff-a789-daa275651b54)
releases.name: colorizelt 0.0.7

releases.author: WiNE-iNEFF
releases.description:
Fist version of "Colorizelt" plugin.

- Add 4 colors (red, yellow, green, blue) and keyboard shortcut for this colors
- Added the ability to delete corresponding colors in a selected fragment using the same shortcut keys
releases.name: colorizelt 0.0.1
